name: Draftbit
description: Draftbit — Visual no-code React Native app builder with code export, custom components, and REST API support.

seo.title: Draftbit — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Draftbit: Draftbit — Visual no-code React Native app builder with code export, custom components, and REST API support.

when_to_use: Visual React Native app built and exported as real code
Mobile MVP for a startup launched without a mobile dev
Cross-platform app with REST API connected data sources
Custom component library for no-code mobile app builds
Client mobile app prototype with code export handoff

pros: Visual builder for real React Native apps
review.verdict: Rare no-code tool that actually exports maintainable React Native code — valuable if that matters to you.
review.best_for: Teams prototyping React Native apps who want to keep code ownership
review.not_for: Non-developers who never plan to export or read the generated code

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
